comments.comment: For the 2019 reporting year, we have used a combination of the Natural Gas Combustion Emissions Calculator provide in the NPRI Toolkit and our own emissions spreadsheet. This combination has allowed for more accurate reporting on VOC’s.  Over all emissions have increased due to market opportunities favorable to on-site generation.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The values used for the reported releases are a combination of actual monitoring and emission factors. In addition, the winter of 2016 was particularly warm and resulted in a significant reduction in natural gas usage. In addition to warmer ambient temperatures, the U of A continues to reduce energy usage under our 2005-2020 GHG Reduction Plan. For the 2016 reporting year, there was a 4% reduction in natural gas consumption.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Due to both the warmer than normal winter and energy usage reduction strategies natural gas consumption was reduced by approximately 4%.
